title: Made in Europe means scaling what already works [Promoted Content]
summary_full: The urgency is real. The latest Deloitte monitoring report shows that 83% of Europe’s competitiveness indicators have not improved in the last two years. The chemical closures and investment radar by Cefic, the European chemical industry association, shows a wave of capacity being shut down while investment flows to regions with clearer industrial policy and […]
